headline: No more gains, rebuild your deficit today
summary: You gained 0.1 kg last week while needing -0.58 kg/week. Today you stop the pattern and execute: portion control with Huel, intentional movement, and genuine deficit.
details: Eat three Huel portions today—no snacking, no additions, no exceptions. Hit the rowing machine or treadmill for 45 minutes before lunch; this single session creates the calorie deficit you lost last week. You're 32 days behind with 405 days to reach 88 kg. Today is the day the direction changes. Tuesday discipline matters because Friday-Sunday snacking is your weakness—prove you own this week starting now.
